FolioSync 1.0

Your professional identity,
assembled instantly.

Connect your GitHub or LinkedIn. We automatically extract your work, generate a clean portfolio, and keep it in sync. No dragging and dropping required.

Start for free

Workflow

How it works

A frictionless deployment pipeline for your professional identity.

1

Connect

Link your GitHub or LinkedIn profile in one click. We only read public data.

2

Generate

Our system organizes your repositories, experience, and skills into a clean timeline.

3

Deploy

Claim your subdomain and go live instantly. Your site automatically syncs with your latest work.

Features

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

A comprehensive set of tools focused on reliability and presentation.

Automated Resumes

Converts your GitHub commits and LinkedIn history into professional summaries.

Background Sync

Updates automatically when you push new code or change jobs.

Clean Templates

Multiple layout options designed with restraint and proper typography.

Custom Domains

Connect your own domain with automatic SSL provisioning.

Project Curation

Automatically surfaces repositories with the highest impact and stars.

SEO Ready

Server-side rendering, meta tags, and semantic HTML built-in.

Traffic Analytics

Privacy-friendly analytics to see visitor counts and project interest.

Privacy Controls

Hide specific repositories, toggle sections, and control exactly what gets public visibility.

Templates

Design systems.

Beautifully crafted starting blocks. Easily switch bases instantly.

minimal.foliosync.dev

Your Name

Software Engineer focused on building robust backends and clean user interfaces.

TypeScriptReactNode.jsPostgreSQL

Standard system typography. Zero distractions.

Integrations

Connect everything.

Link your existing platforms. The system handles data extraction, formatting, and synchronisation.

GitHub

Sync repositories, stars, languages, and contribution graphs automatically.

LinkedIn

Import professional experience, education, and acquired skills.

Twitter / X

Display your bio, follower metrics, and recent top-performing posts.

Dev.to

Showcase published technical articles and community reactions.

Medium

Link long-form stories and publications via standard RSS feeds.

Dribbble

Connect design portfolios to display shots and visual projects.

Pricing

Predictable plans.

Start for free. Upgrade only when you need custom domains or real-time sync.

Hobby

$0per month

For individuals building their first portfolio.

Start for free
  • 1 deployed portfolio
  • 3 platform connections
  • Standard templates
  • foliosync.dev subdomain
  • Weekly synchronisation
  • Community support
Most Popular

Pro

$8per month

For active professionals and creators.

Start Pro Trial
  • Everything in Hobby
  • Unlimited platform connections
  • All premium templates
  • Custom domain support
  • Real-time synchronisation
  • Traffic analytics
  • Remove branding
  • Priority email support

Developer feedback

"I've always delayed updating my portfolio because it took hours. Connecting my GitHub and watching the platform assemble a clean, readable layout in seconds was incredible. It actually works."

Alex

Senior UX Designer

"The automatic deployment is what sold me. I push code to GitHub, and my portfolio updates my recent projects in the background. It's truly zero maintenance."

Jordan

Full-Stack Engineer

Frequently Asked Questions

We use read-only access to your connected platforms (GitHub, LinkedIn) to extract your work history, repository stats, and general skills. Our system structures this raw data into semantic HTML and applies a design template.

portfolio today.

Connect your accounts and go live in minutes. No credit card required.
